events.title: East Coast Awakening
events.description:
East Coast Awakening
It's more than a conference—it’s a call to a generation. In the Bible, God used young people to shift entire generations. We believe He’s doing it again.

events.title: Spring Revival 2026
events.description: Five nights of Spirit-filled preaching, worship, and altar ministry. Guest ministers from across the region — all are welcome.

events.title: Community Day
events.description: A day of food, fun, and fellowship for all of Camden County. Free lunch, inflatables for the kids, and gospel music.

events.title: Summer Youth Retreat
events.description: Four days away. A generation encountering Christ. Worship, teaching, sports, and friendships that last. 12–18 years.

events.title: Backpack Giveaway
events.description: Free backpacks and school supplies for families in Camden County. Every child sent off blessed.

events.title: Community Thanksgiving Dinner
events.description: A free, home-cooked meal for anyone in the community. Come hungry, leave full — in every way.

events.title: Christmas Eve Service
events.description: Carols, candles, and the timeless story of Emmanuel — God with us. A family favorite.
